name: method
value: Use this packet to separate three timing layers: bare/open-sim actuator lag, real-flight command/RPM correlation lag, and short-window RPM slew. PR12562 and APdrone rows are real logs but not controlled bench steps, so they constrain order of magnitude and failure cases rather than exact motor transfer functions.
